name: We're Going to Claim the One Piece!!!

issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (Main phase card activation), not 'Activated' (typically for abilities with costs)
Condition is missing required LeaderHasAnyType check for {Animal Kingdom Pirates} or {Big Mom Pirates}
SearchDeck action is incomplete: missing filter for card types, missing 'look at 5' mechanic, missing reveal/reveal-up-to-1 logic, missing bottom-deck placement of remaining cards

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] If your Leader has the {Animal Kingdom Pirates} or {Big Mom Pirates} type, look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Animal Kingdom Pirates} or {Big Mom Pirates} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
